# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.
# Category: edge_computing_security

// main.ts - Deno Deploy application with dynamic module loading plugin system

// Plugin interface that all plugins must implement
interface Plugin {
  name: string;
  version?: string;
  init?: () => Promise<void> | void;
  handle?: (request: Request) => Promise<Response | null> | Response | null;
  transform?: (data: unknown) => Promise<unknown> | unknown;
}

// Plugin registry to keep track of loaded plugins
const pluginRegistry: Map<string, Plugin> = new Map();

// Allowed module sources for security (configurable via env)
function getAllowedModulePrefixes(): string[] {
  const envPrefixes = Deno.env.get("ALLOWED_MODULE_PREFIXES");
  if (envPrefixes) {
    return envPrefixes.split(",").map((p) => p.trim());
  }
  // Default allowed prefixes
  return [
    "https://deno.land/",
    "https://esm.sh/",
    "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/",
    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/",
    "./plugins/",
  ];
}

function isModuleAllowed(modulePath: string): boolean {
  const allowedPrefixes = getAllowedModulePrefixes();
  return allowedPrefixes.some((prefix) => modulePath.startsWith(prefix));
}

// Load a single plugin module dynamically
async function loadPlugin(modulePath: string): Promise<Plugin | null> {
  if (!isModuleAllowed(modulePath)) {
    console.error(
      `Module not allowed: ${modulePath}. Allowed prefixes: ${getAllowedModulePrefixes().join(", ")}`
    );
    return null;
  }

  // Check if already loaded
  if (pluginRegistry.has(modulePath)) {
    console.log(`Plugin already loaded: ${modulePath}`);
    return pluginRegistry.get(modulePath)!;
  }

  try {
    console.log(`Loading plugin from: ${modulePath}`);
    const module = await import(modulePath);

    // Support both default export and named 'plugin' export
    const plugin: Plugin = module.default || module.plugin;

    if (!plugin || !plugin.name) {
      console.error(
        `Invalid plugin format from ${modulePath}: must export an object with at least a 'name' property`
      );
      return null;
    }

    // Initialize plugin if it has an init method
    if (plugin.init) {
      await plugin.init();
      console.log(`Plugin initialized: ${plugin.name}`);
    }

    pluginRegistry.set(modulePath, plugin);
    console.log(
      `Plugin loaded successfully: ${plugin.name}${plugin.version ? ` v${plugin.version}` : ""}`
    );
    return plugin;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(`Failed to load plugin from ${modulePath}:`, error);
    return null;
  }
}

// Load plugins from environment variable
async function loadPluginsFromEnv(): Promise<void> {
  const pluginPaths = Deno.env.get("PLUGINS");
  if (!pluginPaths) {
    console.log("No PLUGINS environment variable set");
    return;
  }

  const paths = pluginPaths.split(",").map((p) => p.trim()).filter(Boolean);
  console.log(`Loading ${paths.length} plugin(s) from environment...`);

  const results = await Promise.allSettled(paths.map(loadPlugin));

  results.forEach((result, index) => {
    if (result.status === "rejected") {
      console.error(`Failed to load plugin ${paths[index]}:`, result.reason);
    }
  });
}

// Load plugins from query parameters
async function loadPluginsFromQuery(url: URL): Promise<Plugin[]> {
  const pluginParams = url.searchParams.getAll("plugin");
  const loadedPlugins: Plugin[] = [];

  for (const modulePath of pluginParams) {
    const plugin = await loadPlugin(modulePath);
    if (plugin) {
      loadedPlugins.push(plugin);
    }
  }

  return loadedPlugins;
}

// Run request through plugin pipeline
async function runPluginPipeline(request: Request): Promise<Response | null> {
  for (const [, plugin] of pluginRegistry) {
    if (plugin.handle) {
      try {
        const response = await plugin.handle(request);
        if (response) {
          return response;
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error(`Plugin ${plugin.name} error handling request:`, error);
      }
    }
  }
  return null;
}

// Transform data through plugin pipeline
async function runTransformPipeline(data: unknown): Promise<unknown> {
  let result = data;
  for (const [, plugin] of pluginRegistry) {
    if (plugin.transform) {
      try {
        result = await plugin.transform(result);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error(`Plugin ${plugin.name} error transforming data:`, error);
      }
    }
  }
  return result;
}

// Get plugin status information
function getPluginStatus(): Record<string, unknown>[] {
  const plugins: Record<string, unknown>[] = [];
  for (const [path, plugin] of pluginRegistry) {
    plugins.push({
      name: plugin.name,
      version: plugin.version || "unknown",
      path,
      hasHandler: !!plugin.handle,
      hasTransform: !!plugin.transform,
    });
  }
  return plugins;
}

// Load env-configured plugins at startup
await loadPluginsFromEnv();

// Main request handler
Deno.serve(async (request: Request): Promise<Response> => {
  const url = new URL(request.url);

  try {
    // Route: Load plugins via query parameter
    if (url.pathname === "/load-plugins") {
      const loadedPlugins = await loadPluginsFromQuery(url);
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          success: true,
          loaded: loadedPlugins.map((p) => ({
            name: p.name,
            version: p.version,
          })),
          totalPlugins: pluginRegistry.size,
        }),
        {
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        }
      );
    }

    // Route: Unload a plugin
    if (url.pathname === "/unload-plugin" && request.method === "POST") {
      const body = await request.json();
      const modulePath = body.path as string;

      if (pluginRegistry.has(modulePath)) {
        const plugin = pluginRegistry.get(modulePath)!;
        pluginRegistry.delete(modulePath);
        return new Response(
          JSON.stringify({
            success: true,
            message: `Plugin '${plugin.name}' unloaded`,
            totalPlugins: pluginRegistry.size,
          }),
          {
            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
          }
        );
      }

      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          success: false,
          message: `Plugin not found: ${modulePath}`,
        }),
        {
          status: 404,
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        }
      );
    }

    // Route: Plugin status
    if (url.pathname === "/plugins") {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          plugins: getPluginStatus(),
          totalPlugins: pluginRegistry.size,
          allowedPrefixes: getAllowedModulePrefixes(),
        }),
        {
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        }
      );
    }

    // Route: Transform data through plugins
    if (url.pathname === "/transform" && request.method === "POST") {
      const inputData = await request.json();
      const transformedData = await runTransformPipeline(inputData);
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          success: true,
          original: inputData,
          transformed: transformedData,
          pluginsApplied: [...pluginRegistry.values()]
            .filter((p) => p.transform)
            .map((p) => p.name),
        }),
        {
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        }
      );
    }

    // Route: Dynamic load and execute - load a module on the fly and run it
    if (url.pathname === "/execute") {
      const modulePath = url.searchParams.get("module");
      if (!modulePath) {
        return new Response(
          JSON.stringify({
            success: false,
            message: "Missing 'module' query parameter",
          }),
          {
            status: 400,
            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
          }
        );
      }

      const plugin = await loadPlugin(modulePath);
      if (!plugin) {
        return new Response(
          JSON.stringify({
            success: false,
            message: `Failed to load module: ${modulePath}`,
          }),
          {
            status: 400,
            headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
          }
        );
      }

      // Try to run the plugin's handle method
      if (plugin.handle) {
        const pluginResponse = await plugin.handle(request);
        if (pluginResponse) {
          return pluginResponse;
        }
      }

      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          success: true,
          message: `Plugin '${plugin.name}' loaded but did not produce a response`,
          plugin: {
            name: plugin.name,
            version: plugin.version,
          },
        }),
        {
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        }
      );
    }

    // Try running the request through the plugin pipeline first
    const pluginResponse = await runPluginPipeline(request);
    if (pluginResponse) {
      return pluginResponse;
    }

    // Route: Health check
    if (url.pathname === "/health") {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          status: "healthy",
          pluginsLoaded: pluginRegistry.size,
          timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
        }),
        {
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        }
      );
    }

    // Default route: API documentation
    if (url.pathname === "/" || url.pathname === "") {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          name: "Deno Deploy Plugin System",
          description:
            "Dynamic module loading plugin system for Deno Deploy edge runtime",
          endpoints: {
            "GET /": "This documentation",
            "GET /health": "Health check with plugin count",
            "GET /plugins": "List all loaded plugins and their status",
            "GET /load-plugins?plugin=<url>&plugin=<url>":
              "Load one or more plugins from URLs",
            "POST /unload-plugin": "Unload a plugin by path (body: { path: string })",
            "GET /execute?module=<url>":
              "Load and execute a plugin module on the fly",
            "POST /transform":
              "Transform JSON data through all loaded plugin transform pipelines",
          },
          configuration: {
            PLUGINS:
              "Comma-separated list of module URLs to load at startup (env var)",
            ALLOWED_MODULE_PREFIXES:
              "Comma-separated list of allowed URL prefixes for security (env var)",
          },
          example: {
            loadPlugin:
              "/load-plugins?plugin=https://esm.sh/my-plugin@1.0.0",
            executeModule:
              "/execute?module=https://deno.land/x/my_module@v1.0.0/mod.ts",
          },
        }),
        {
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        }
      );
    }

    // 404 for unmatched routes
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        error: "Not Found",
        message: `No route matches ${url.pathname}. Visit / for API documentation.`,
      }),
      {
        status: 404,
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      }
    );
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Unhandled error:", error);
    const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error";
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        error: "Internal Server Error",
        message: errorMessage,
      }),
      {
        status: 500,
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      }
    );
  }
});
